rationale: ADAPTIVE: epochs=12, no clipping. Trial 006 showed clipping=1.0 is too aggressive (3x worse val_loss). Grad norms->0 by ep11 in all prior trials means ep12-20 are dead compute. This trial confirms whether 12 epochs without clipping = 20 epochs. If val_loss ~1.156e-05, use epochs=12 for all remaining trials to halve training time per trial.
error: UNDERPERFORM: epochs=12 without clipping gives val_loss=1.1967e-05 vs 1.1565e-05 for 20-epoch trials (-2.7% vs control instead of -5.9%). Model still benefits from ep12-20. Conclusion: keep epochs=20 for all remaining trials.
